steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage establishes 1931 as the moment scientists assumed androsterone existed only in animals, then closes with “but this discovery wouldn't come until decades later.” The blank must introduce a future discovery that contradicts the 1931 assumption.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content: “Eventually” signals a future discovery decades after 1931. The other three miss the temporal progression: “For example” illustrates rather than advances time, “In other words” rephrases, and “Earlier” moves backward. That confirms B is correct.
